title: Pregnancy dating discussion documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

follow_up.text: Defines clinician-performed transvaginal or selected transabdominal ultrasound and cautions against overinterpreting one early scan or LMP alone.
follow_up.rationale: Supports clinician-reviewed ultrasound findings for location and viability without independently calculating or asserting gestational age.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Defines clinician-performed transvaginal or selected transabdominal ultrasound and cautions against overinterpreting one early scan or LMP alone.

source_limitations: Menstrual date, cycle, conception, ultrasound measurements, report and clinician dating conclusion are absent.
No gestational age, estimated due date, viability or pregnancy location is generated.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
